Class SongViewBuilder

java.lang.Object
com.sebastiandorata.musicdashboard.presentation.libraryViews.SongViewBuilder
public class SongViewBuilder extends Object
Builds reusable song and album display components, list views, card grids, and album grids, used in the library.

Two constructors are available:

  • The full constructor accepts a SongEditDialog so that right-clicking a song row opens the edit dialog.
  • The convenience constructor omits the dialog for read-only contexts such as the Favourites or Artist detail screens.

Click behaviour on every song row:

  • Double left-click: play song and set queue.
  • Right-click: open edit dialog (if available).
  • Single left-click: no action.

List views group songs under A-Z section dividers and include a vertical AlphabetBar on the right edge. Clicking a letter scrolls the list to that section instantly.

All list and grid builders accept an optional SortStrategy parameter. Overloads without a sort argument default to SortStrategy.ALPHABETICAL for backward compatibility.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SongViewBuilder(LibraryHandler ctx)
    Constructs a read-only SongViewBuilder without an edit dialog.
    SongViewBuilder(LibraryHandler ctx, SongEditDialog editDialog)
    Constructs a SongViewBuilder with edit-dialog support.

  • Constructor Details

    • SongViewBuilder

      public SongViewBuilder(LibraryHandler ctx, SongEditDialog editDialog)
      Constructs a SongViewBuilder with edit-dialog support.
      Parameters:
      ctx - the LibraryHandler providing services and callbacks
      editDialog - the dialog opened when the user right-clicks a song row, may be null to disable editing

    • SongViewBuilder

      public SongViewBuilder(LibraryHandler ctx)
      Constructs a read-only SongViewBuilder without an edit dialog. Right-clicking a song row will have no effect.
      Parameters:
      ctx - the LibraryHandler providing services and callbacks

  • Method Details

    • buildListView

      public javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane buildListView(List<Song> songs, SortStrategy sort)
      Builds a scrollable list of songs grouped under A–Z section dividers, with a vertical AlphabetBar on the right that jumps to each section.

      Songs are sorted by the given strategy before grouping. Double left-clicking a row starts playback and sets the full sorted list as the queue. Right-clicking opens the SongEditDialog if one was supplied.

      Parameters:
      songs - the songs to display
      sort - the SortStrategy to apply before rendering
      Returns:
      a BorderPane with the grouped song list in the center and the AlphabetBar on the right

    • buildListView

      public javafx.scene.layout.BorderPane buildListView(List<Song> songs)
      Builds a grouped, scrollable song list using SortStrategy.ALPHABETICAL. Equivalent to calling buildListView(List, SortStrategy) with SortStrategy.ALPHABETICAL.
      Parameters:
      songs - the songs to display
      Returns:
      a BorderPane with the grouped song list and alphabet bar

    • buildGridView

      public javafx.scene.layout.TilePane buildGridView(List<Song> songs, SortStrategy sort)
      Builds a TilePane card grid of songs sorted by the given strategy.

      Each card is created by CardFactory.createSongCard(Song, MusicPlayerService) and clicking it starts playback with the full sorted list as the queue.

      Parameters:
      songs - the songs to display
      sort - the SortStrategy to apply before rendering
      Returns:
      a configured TilePane ready to be added to the scene graph

    • buildGridView

      public javafx.scene.layout.TilePane buildGridView(List<Song> songs)
      Builds a song card grid using SortStrategy.ALPHABETICAL. Equivalent to calling buildGridView(List, SortStrategy) with SortStrategy.ALPHABETICAL.
      Parameters:
      songs - the songs to display
      Returns:
      a configured TilePane ready to be added to the scene graph

    • buildAlbumGridView

      public javafx.scene.layout.TilePane buildAlbumGridView(List<Album> albums, Runnable onAlbumClick, Consumer<Album> onSelect)
      Builds a TilePane card grid of albums.

      Each album card is created by CardFactory.createAlbumCard(Album, MusicPlayerService). Clicking a card fires both onAlbumClick and onSelect so the caller can navigate to the album detail view.

      Parameters:
      albums - the albums to display
      onAlbumClick - a Runnable invoked after onSelect on each click
      onSelect - a Consumer receiving the clicked album
      Returns:
      a configured TilePane ready to be added to the scene graph
